title: Bungie gives up on Destiny
summary: Bungie is ending development on Destiny 2, with the final major update arriving June 9th before the studio shifts focus to new projects. The game will remain playable afterward, similar to the original Destiny, with changes designed to welcome returning players.
content:
Bungie is moving on from Destiny 2. The studio announced Thursday that it's releasing the last major update for the game on June 9th as its focus "turns towards a new beginning for Bungie." After that final update, the game will remain playable, much like the first Destiny. "Many changes in this final update will aim to ensure that Destiny 2 is a welcoming place for players to return to," Bungie says. 
The announcement post has a lot of information about what will be added to this final update, and up to and shortly after launch, Bungie will share more details about the changes. But after that, its weekly blog entries will "be entering a fo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 邦吉结束《命运2》开发
zh.summary: 邦吉正在结束《命运2》的开发，最终主要更新将于6月9日发布，之后工作室将转向新项目。游戏之后仍将保持可玩状态，类似于原始《命运》，并做出了一些改变以欢迎回归玩家。

title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
summary: Convective Capital has raised $85 million to expand its disaster resilience focus beyond fire technology. The investment signals growing interest in companies addressing climate-related infrastructure challenges.
content: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

zh.title: Convective Capital募集8500万美元基金以建立灾害抵御力
zh.summary: Convective Capital已募集8500万美元，以将其灾害抵御力关注范围扩展到消防技术之外。该投资表明人们对解决气候相关基础设施挑战的公司越来越感兴趣。

title: Trump delays AI security executive order: ‘I don’t want to get in the way of that leading’
summary: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring government pre-release security reviews of AI models, expressing concerns about the order's language potentially hindering AI advancement. The delay underscores tensions between AI regulation and industry development interests.
content: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

zh.title: 特朗普延迟AI安全行政令："我不想妨碍那个领先的地位"
zh.summary: 特朗普总统推迟签署一项要求政府对AI模型进行发布前安全审查的行政令，他表达了对该命令措辞可能阻碍AI发展的担忧。这一延迟凸显了AI监管和行业发展利益之间的紧张关系。

title: Sonos’s pint-sized Roam 2 speaker is 25 percent off for Memorial Day
summary: The Sonos Roam 2 portable Bluetooth speaker is on sale for $134 (25% off) across major retailers this Memorial Day, down from its $179 regular price. The lightweight, water-resistant speaker offers improved Bluetooth pairing over its predecessor and up to 10 hours of battery life.
content:
The Sonos Roam 2 is about the size of a small water bottle and comes in multiple colors. | Image: Sonos	

If your summer plans involve spending any time outdoors, whether on the trail or at a pool party, a good portable Bluetooth speaker can go a long way. The latest Sonos Roam is built precisely for those moments, and right now, it’s on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart for $134 ($45 off) for Memorial Day, matching its lowest price to date.
Sonos Roam 2

Where to Buy:

 $179 $134 at Amazon
 $179 $134 at Walmart
 $179 $134 at Best Buy

The second-gen Roam builds on what made the original such an impressive Bluetooth speaker for its size. Most notably, it’s much easier to use right out of the box. Unlike the first-gen model, which required you to set it up using the Sonos app over Wi-Fi before you could start listening to music, the newer version lets you pair it over Bluetooth immediately. It now also sports a dedicated Bluetooth pairing button on the back, making it easier to connect to various Bluetooth devices than the OG model, which relied on a single, multi-use button.
Otherwise, though, the Sonos Roam 2 is very similar to the original model. The lightweight speaker stands 6.61 inches tall and is roughly the size of a small water bottle, so it’s easy to toss in a backpack. It’s also IP67-rated for dust and water resistance and lasts 10 hours on a single charge, which should be enough for an afternoon at the pool or park.
Just as importantly, it sounds great. The second-gen model delivers the same clear sound as the original, with the ability to automatically adjust to your surroundings using Sonos’s Trueplay feature. You can also easily switch between listening to the Roam 2 and other Sonos speakers, too, or even stream audio from a Bluetooth-connected device across the rest of your Sonos system. Its tiny size means you’re not going to get the kind of rich bass you’d get from a dedicated party speaker or the new Sonos Play, but you can pair it with another

zh.title: Sonos Roam 2 小型扬声器在阵亡将士纪念日优惠25%
zh.summary: Sonos Roam 2 便携式蓝牙扬声器在这个阵亡将士纪念日在主要零售商处以134美元（降价25%）的价格出售，比原价179美元有所下降。这款轻量级、防水扬声器相比其前代产品提供了改进的蓝牙配对，并可提供长达10小时的电池续航。

title: The Endless AI guitar pedal has potential
summary: Polyend has released the Endless, a $299 AI-powered programmable guitar pedal that uses text prompts and interconnected AI agents to generate guitar effects. The device represents an emerging category of AI music tools, applying machine learning to traditionally analog instrument processing.
content:
You can buy physical plates to pair with your AI effects. | Photo: Terrence O’Brien / The Verge	

I'm not sure anyone was really asking for an AI guitar pedal. But it was inevitable that someone would build one. One of the first to take the plunge is Polyend, a well-respected music gear maker with a reputation for building niche, idiosyncratic devices. The company has built grooveboxes around old-school trackers and a multi-effect pedal that you can step sequence. So there was at least some hope that if anyone could do an AI effect pedal right, it would be Polyend. 
Polyend's Endless is a $299 programmable guitar pedal running an ARM processor. It's paired with Playground, a number of interconnected AI agents that turn any text prompt i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Endless AI 吉他踏板展现潜力
zh.summary: Polyend 发布了 Endless，这是一款价格为299美元的AI驱动可编程吉他踏板，使用文本提示和互联AI代理生成吉他效果。该设备代表了新兴的AI音乐工具类别，将机器学习应用于传统模拟乐器处理。

title: Uber is deploying its own self-driving cars again, just not as robotaxis
summary: Uber is deploying its own autonomous vehicles again through a new AV Lab project to collect data for its robotaxi partners, not operating them as commercial robotaxis themselves. The move marks a return to autonomous vehicle development after Uber divested its AV division in 2020 following a fatal accident.
content:
The project is starting small with just one Hyundai Ioniq 5, though Uber says its not wedded to that model. | Image: Balaji Krishnamurthy / X	

Uber is putting its own autonomous vehicles back on the road as part of its new AV Lab project to collect data for its dozens of robotaxi partners. The cars will be fitted with all the sensors typical of self-driving cars, like cameras, lidar, and radar. But notably the vehicles will not be operating as robotaxis, just gathering data for Uber's dozens of robotaxi partners. 
That's an important distinction, especially if you know anything about Uber's fraught history with self-driving cars. Uber sold off its AV division in 2020 after one of its self-driving cars killed a woman in Tempe, Arizona. Since then, the company has formed partnership …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 优步再次部署自动驾驶汽车，但不作为机器人出租车
zh.summary: 优步通过新的AV Lab项目再次部署自动驾驶汽车，为其机器人出租车合作伙伴收集数据，但不作为商业机器人出租车运营。这一举措标志着优步在2020年因致命事故剥离其自动驾驶部门后回归自动驾驶开发。

title: This mechanical bird drops dead when your home’s air quality worsens
summary: Birdie Pro is an updated air-quality monitor that uses a mechanical bird to visually indicate indoor air quality, "dying" when CO2 levels spike and "reviving" when air improves. The new version adds additional sensors for more comprehensive environmental analysis beyond the original's CO2 tracking.
content:
When air quality drops the bird simulates fainting and death by succumbing to gravity and hanging upside down. | Image: Birdie	

The original Birdie debuted in 2022 with a morbid-but-fun design - an air-quality monitor with a literal canary in a coal mine. When the CO2 in your home hit a certain level, a mechanical bird mounted on your wall would appear to drop dead, then prompt you to open a window to air things out. Once the air quality improved, the bird miraculously came back to life. The new Birdie Pro carries forward that same design and approach, but adds additional sensors providing a more comprehensive analysis of the environment in your home.
Birdie Pro is now available through a Kickstarter crowdfunding campaign and can be preordered with a discount that b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这只机械鸟在你家空气质量恶化时会"死亡"
zh.summary: Birdie Pro是一款升级的空气质量监测器，使用机械鸟直观显示室内空气质量，当二氧化碳水平升高时"死亡"，空气改善时"复活"。新版本增加了额外传感器，提供超越原始版本二氧化碳跟踪的更全面的环保分析。

title: Top Gun turns 40
summary: Tony Scott's 1986 "Top Gun" and its 2022 sequel "Top Gun: Maverick" have served as effective recruitment tools for the US Navy despite their entertainment focus. The films demonstrate the Navy's enduring interest in Hollywood partnerships for promotional purposes.
content: Tony Scott's 1986 blockbuster and the 2022 sequel are the best recruitment tools the US Navy could hope for.

zh.title: 《壮志凌云》40周年
zh.summary: 托尼·斯科特执导的1986年《壮志凌云》及其2022年续集《壮志凌云：独行侠》尽管专注于娱乐，但仍然成为了美国海军的有效招募工具。这些影片展示了美国海军对好莱坞合作用于宣传目的的持久兴趣。

title: The cost of the smart home is going up
summary: Google is expanding its Gemini for Home AI capabilities through APIs to third-party manufacturers, signaling a shift toward subscription-based monetization in the struggling smart home market. Major tech companies including Google and Amazon have struggled with profitability despite massive investments, now seeking revenue through AI-powered services.
content:
Google is expanding its AI-powered Gemini for Home capabilities beyond its cameras and smart speakers to other manufacturers to sell more subscriptions. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Selling the smart home has been hard. Even Amazon has lost money in the space, despite putting hundreds of millions of Echo devices in people's homes. Google has also reportedly struggled to turn a profit from its substantial investment in Nest. But now Google is seeing dollar signs in the prospect of selling AI-driven subscriptions in the smart home. And it's not alone.
At Google I/O this week, Google announced it's expanding its Gemini for Home APIs to allow companies to integrate more of its Gemini-powered smart home features into their own apps. In a blog post, Google's Ravi Akella, director of product management for the Home Platform,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 智能家居的成本在上升
zh.summary: 谷歌通过API将其Gemini for Home人工智能功能扩展到第三方制造商，这表明苦苦挣扎的智能家居市场正在转向基于订阅的货币化模式。包括谷歌和亚马逊在内的主要科技公司尽管投入巨大但仍在盈利能力上面临困难，现在正在寻求通过人工智能驱动的服务获取收入。

title: Uh-oh, the International Space Station is leaking again
summary: The International Space Station is experiencing another leak, reinforcing support among officials for the planned 2030 retirement of the aging orbital outpost. The incident highlights ongoing maintenance challenges facing the decades-old facility.
content: "This further confirms the wisdom of the current policy of retiring the ISS in 2030."

zh.title: 哎呀，国际空间站又在泄漏了
zh.summary: 国际空间站遭遇另一次泄漏，这强化了官员们对2030年退役这个老化轨道前哨计划的支持。该事件突显了这个已有数十年历史的设施所面临的持续维护挑战。

title: Meta and Google get data from the app your boss uses to track you
summary: A Columbia Law School study found that workplace monitoring software used by hundreds of thousands of employers shares employee data—including names, email addresses, and web history—with Meta, Google, and other data brokers. The discovery raises privacy concerns about the extent of data collection and third-party sharing in workplace surveillance tools.
content:
Hundreds of thousands of workplaces use software to monitor employees. Now, a new study has found that many of these tools share data not just with employers, but with digital advertising platforms and data brokers as well. 
The review was led by Stephanie Nguyen, senior fellow at Columbia Law School's Center for Law and the Economy and former Federal Trade Commission chief technologist under Lina Khan. It examined nine workplace monitoring (or "bossware") services and found that all of them shared some information with third-party platforms. The data ranged from names and email addresses to web history, and recipients included Facebook, Go …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta和谷歌从你老板用来追踪你的应用中获取数据
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚法学院的一项研究发现，数十万雇主使用的员工监控软件与Meta、谷歌和其他数据代理共享员工数据——包括姓名、电子邮件地址和网络浏览历史。这一发现引发了人们对工作场所监控工具中数据收集范围和第三方共享的隐私担忧。

title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
summary: Fragrance tech startup Patina has raised $2 million from investors including Betaworks and True Ventures to disrupt the fragrance industry, which has remained largely unchanged for decades. The funding highlights emerging interest in modernizing traditional consumer goods sectors through technology.
content: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

zh.title: 这家年轻的初创公司正在挑战一个近半个世纪未变的香水行业
zh.summary: 香水科技初创公司Patina从包括Betaworks和True Ventures在内的投资者那里筹集了200万美元，以打破数十年来基本保持不变的香水行业。这笔融资突显了人们对通过技术实现传统消费品部门现代化的新兴兴趣。

title: GitHub faces a fight for its survival at Microsoft
summary: GitHub is battling for stability within Microsoft as it faces multiple major outages, a remote code execution vulnerability, and compromised internal repositories—all occurring within recent weeks. The struggles underscore concerns about Microsoft's stewardship of the critical platform that developers rely on.
content:
When Microsoft announced it was acquiring GitHub in a $7.5 billion deal in 2018, developers were nervous. Some were concerned about Microsoft controlling GitHub, and others were taking a wait-and-see approach. Nearly eight years later, GitHub is now fighting for its survival, amid a surge of outages, security issues, and pressure from competitors.
In the last few weeks alone, GitHub had multiple major outages, a remote code execution vulnerability disclosure, and its internal code repositories hacked due to a "poisoned" VS Code extension on an employee's device. I've spoken to current and former GitHub employees who all paint a picture of a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GitHub在微软内的生存之战
zh.summary: GitHub正在微软内为维持稳定而奋力抗争，面临多次重大宕机、远程代码执行漏洞以及内部仓库遭破坏等问题——所有这些都在近几周内相继发生。这些困难反映了人们对微软如何管理开发者依赖的这一关键平台的担忧。

title: Spotify is launching AI-generated remixes
summary: Spotify and Universal Music Group announced a licensing deal enabling users to create AI-generated remixes and covers of streaming songs, available as a paid Premium add-on. Artists can opt out, but participating artists will receive royalties on AI-generated versions of their work.
content:
Spotify and Universal Music Group (UMG) just announced a licensing deal that will allow users to prompt the creation of AI-generated remixes and covers for streaming songs. The tool will be a paid add-on for Premium subscribers. Artists will be able to opt out of the program, but those who do participate will collect royalties on these AI remixes.
In October of last year, Spotify announced that it was working with UMG, as well as other major labels, Sony Music Group, Warner Music Group, Merlin, and Believe, to create "responsible AI products." At the time, it was unclear exactly what that meant. But this appears to be the first product of t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify推出AI生成混音功能
zh.summary: Spotify和环球音乐集团宣布达成许可协议，允许用户创建流媒体歌曲的AI生成混音和翻唱版本，作为付费Premium附加服务提供。艺术家可以选择退出，但参与的艺术家将获得其作品AI生成版本的版税收入。

title: Spotify is going to reserve concert tickets for ‘real fans’
summary: Spotify is launching a "Reserved" program that allocates concert tickets to verified "real fans" of artists based on streaming activity and engagement metrics, available exclusively to Premium members. The initiative aims to reduce scalping and bot purchases while requiring Spotify Premium membership for eligibility.
content:
As part of a new "Reserved" program, Spotify is going to start offering concert tickets for "real fans" of participating bands that are going on tour. The idea with the Reserved program is to give people an option to buy tickets without the hassle and stress that often comes with securing a spot for a popular act. But you'll have to be a Spotify Premium member to be eligible, and how exactly Spotify determines who is a real fan is a touch murky.
Here's how Spotify will select fans:
We'll identify real fans based on factors like streams, shares, and other Spotify activity, and will also monitor the activity of Premium users to ensure these …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify将为"真粉丝"预留演唱会门票
zh.summary: Spotify推出"Reserved"计划，根据用户的流媒体活动和参与度指标，为经过验证的"真粉丝"分配演唱会门票，仅限Premium会员享受。该计划旨在减少黄牛党和机器人购票现象，同时要求用户必须拥有Spotify Premium会员资格才能参与。

title: I review robot vacuums for a living, ask me anything!
summary: The Verge's smart home reviewer is hosting an exclusive subscriber AMA about robot vacuums, a category they test extensively for their job. They've recently published a buying guide and reviewed multiple new models, including the innovative Matic vacuum.
content:
Me and my buddies. | Photo by Rose Tuohy for The Verge	

Welcome! I'm The Verge's smart home reviewer, and I'm hosting an exclusive subscriber AMA today at 10 AM PT / 1 PM ET. I test a lot of connected gadgets for my job, but the dominant device in my home - by both number and square footage covered - is the robot vacuum. At any given time, I have a dozen of these bots bouncing around, sweeping and mopping my floors and irritating my cats. 
I just published a guide on how to choose the best robot vacuum for your home, and I recently reviewed the Dyson Spot & Scrub, Shark's Power Detect, and the Matic,  which is the most interesting new approach to a robot vacuum I've seen in my 7 years of reviewi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我以评测扫地机器人为生,有问必答!
zh.summary: The Verge的智能家居评测员正在举办一场关于扫地机器人的独家订阅者问答活动,这是他们工作中广泛测试的一个类别。他们最近发布了一份购买指南,并评测了多款新机型,包括创新的Matic扫地机器人。

title: These clever active beam headlights are finally coming to America
summary: Audi's 2027 Q9 models will feature digital matrix lights that meet new NHTSA safety requirements while minimizing glare for other drivers. These active beam headlights are now becoming available in the American market.
content: The 2027 Audi Q9's digital matrix lights satisfy new NHTSA rules on minimizing glare.

zh.title: 这些聪明的自适应远光灯终于来到美国
zh.summary: 奥迪2027年Q9车型将配备数字矩阵灯,符合新的NHTSA安全要求,同时最大限度地减少对其他驾驶员的眩光。这些自适应远光灯现在正在美国市场上推出。

title: I can’t believe how fast Google vibe coded my first Android app
summary: The Verge's reviewer built three Android apps in a single afternoon using Google's AI Studio, with one generated from just 148 words of typed instructions. The AI-powered tool automatically built and installed complete, working applications to an Android phone.
content:
That’s my own Android app. Bad, yet impressive. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Yesterday, I built my first Android app. Then, I made two more - three in one afternoon.
For one, I literally typed 148 words into my web browser and walked away. Ten minutes later, I had an entire new app on my actual Android phone. I did have to prep that phone by enabling a USB debugging mode and plugging it into my PC, but as advertised, Google's AI Studio did literally everything else for me. 
I typed in words, I hit install, and voilà: an entire working program. I was nearly ready to agree with David, Allison, and Jen: The personal software revolution is here, it's coming to your phone, there's a future where the average person can m …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我无法相信Google用AI编写我的第一个Android应用的速度有多快
zh.summary: The Verge的评测员在一个下午内使用Google的AI Studio构建了三个Android应用,其中一个仅用148个词的文本指令就生成了。这个由AI驱动的工具自动构建并安装完整、可工作的应用程序到Android手机上。

title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch streaming series called "Talk with the People" where he'll answer public questions live. The initiative represents the country's first recurring cross-platform stream hosted by an elected official.
content:
“Hey chat, are billionaires cooked?” | Photo by kena betancur / AFP via Getty Images	

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a streaming series on Twitch, in which he'll respond to questions the public have submitted via the chat, Polygon reports. The series is aptly titled "Talk with the People," and kicks off later today at 4PM ET. 
"With the launch of 'Talk with the People' we're bringing City Hall to the platforms where New Yorkers already are - speaking directly with the people," Mamdani told Polygon in a written statement. "By launching the country's first recurring cross-platform stream hosted by an elected official, where I'll answer New Yorkers' questions live on Twitch, we're opening up a direct line of co …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 纽约市长推出Twitch直播系列
zh.summary: 纽约市长佐兰·马姆达尼推出了一个名为《与人民对话》的Twitch直播系列，他将在其中实时回答公众提问。该倡议代表了美国首次由民选官员主持的定期跨平台直播。

title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
summary: Scammers have discovered a loophole allowing them to send emails from legitimate Microsoft addresses typically used for account notifications. This vulnerability enables spam to appear authentically from Microsoft.
content: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

zh.title: 诈骗分子滥用微软账户发送垃圾邮件链接
zh.summary: 诈骗分子发现了一个安全漏洞，可以从微软官方地址（通常用于账户通知）发送电子邮件。这个漏洞使垃圾邮件看起来像是来自微软的真实邮件。

title: Beauty booking startup Fresha hits $1 billion valuation with KKR backing
summary: Beauty and wellness booking platform Fresha has reached a $1 billion valuation following an $80 million investment round led by KKR's growth equity fund. The funding highlights continued investor confidence in the beauty-tech sector.
content: Beauty and wellness booking marketplace Fresha says it has raised $80 million investment from KKR’s Next Generation Technology Growth fund, KKR's growth equity arm.

zh.title: 美容预订初创公司Fresha在KKR支持下估值达10亿美元
zh.summary: 美容和健身预订平台Fresha在KKR增长股权基金领投的8000万美元融资轮中达到了10亿美元的估值。这笔融资反映了投资者对美容科技领域的持续信心。

title: ‘Fuck you, Bambu’: How one private message could change the face of 3D printing
summary: Bambu Lab demanded a developer remove open-source code that enabled remote control of their 3D printers, sparking significant backlash from the open-source community. The incident highlights tensions around proprietary software that relies on open-source foundations.
content:
Bambu Lab makes the best, most accessible 3D printers yet, but that reputation is suddenly under siege. It all started when Paweł Jarczak received a private message from the company on Reddit asking him to delete his code. Now the 3D printing community is lining up behind Jarczak to fund a war against Bambu - and the future of 3D printers could be at stake.
Jarczak is a developer who shared a way to let people remote control their Bambu printers without using Bambu software. But Bambu wanted to lock down its system, despite relying on open-source code. That provoked a furious coalition of open-source advocates and YouTubers to respond.
"I' …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: "滚开，Bambu"：一条私信如何可能改变3D打印行业格局
zh.summary: Bambu Lab要求开发者删除使其3D打印机能够远程控制的开源代码，引发开源社区的严重反弹。该事件凸显了依赖开源基础的专有软件之间存在的紧张关系。

title: Meta lays off thousands of employees to offset AI investments
summary: Meta has laid off thousands of employees in an effort to offset the costs of its substantial artificial intelligence investments. The company framed the reductions as necessary for operational efficiency.
content:
Meta says it needs to “offset the other investments we're making.” | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

Meta has reportedly notified thousands of employees that they've been laid off as the company attempts to compensate for its hefty AI investments. In an email from Meta management shared by Business Insider, impacted staffers were told that the planned headcount reduction was part of the company's "continued effort to run the company more efficiently and to allow us to offset the other investments we're making."
Reports of an upcoming wave of layoffs started circulating in March, though at that time Meta was believed to be cutting up to 20 percent of its total company headcount. According to a recent memo shared in May, the layoffs are now  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta裁员数千人以抵消AI投资成本
zh.summary: Meta已裁员数千人，以抵消其巨额人工智能投资的成本。该公司将这些裁员措施定性为提高运营效率的必要之举。

title: Truecaller gets into the eSIM business to diversify its revenue streams
summary: Truecaller is expanding into eSIM services with data plans ranging from 1GB over 7 days to 20GB over 30 days, initially launching across 29 countries to diversify revenue streams.
content: The company said its plans will range from 1 GB over 7 days to 20 GB over 30 days. Initially, the launch will make the eSIM product available in 29 countries.

zh.title: Truecaller进入eSIM业务以实现收入多元化
zh.summary: Truecaller正在扩展到eSIM服务，提供从7天1GB到30天20GB的数据套餐，首次在29个国家推出以实现收入多元化。

title: General Catalyst just led a $63M bet on India’s travel payments market
summary: General Catalyst led a $63 million funding round for Scapia, an Indian startup combining travel booking with co-branded credit cards and mobile payments, doubling the company's valuation.
content: Scapia, an Indian startup that combines travel booking with co-branded credit cards and mobile payments, said the deal doubles its valuation.

zh.title: General Catalyst领投6300万美元押注印度旅游支付市场
zh.summary: General Catalyst为印度初创公司Scapia领投了6300万美元融资，该公司将旅游预订与联合品牌信用卡和移动支付相结合，公司估值翻倍。

title: Imperagen raises £5 million to use quantum physics, AI on enzyme engineering
summary: Biotech company Imperagen announced a £5 million seed round led by PXN Ventures to apply quantum physics and AI to enzyme engineering, with participation from IQ Capital and Northern Gritstone.
content: Biotech company Imperagen announced on Thursday a £5 million ($6.7 million) seed round led by PXN Ventures, with participation from IQ Capital and Northern Gritstone.

zh.title: Imperagen融资500万英镑将量子物理和人工智能应用于酶工程
zh.summary: 生物技术公司Imperagen宣布获得由PXN Ventures领投的500万英镑种子轮融资，用于将量子物理和人工智能应用于酶工程，IQ Capital和Northern Gritstone也参与了投资。

title: In SpaceX’s IPO, Elon Musk is a risk factor
summary: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals extensive financial and operational interconnections between Elon Musk's various companies (Tesla, xAI, X, Neuralink, Boring Company), presenting Musk himself as a significant risk factor to the company.
content:
The SpaceX IPO is here, and it's more than just an historic public offering that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire. It also reveals more ways in which Elon Musk's companies interact and overlap with each other, shuffling money around in ways that are often difficult to keep track of. 
This is evident in ways that are both obvious and less so. A CTRL-F search for "Tesla" yields 87 results, xAI is mentioned 356 times, and X 267 times. Even the Boring Company (7 times) and Neuralink (3) get a few mentions. Throughout its 330 pages of rocket launches and interplanetary wishes, you can trace the network of ways in which Musk's  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在SpaceX首次公开募股中，埃隆·马斯克是一个风险因素
zh.summary: SpaceX的首次公开募股申报文件揭示了埃隆·马斯克旗下各家公司（特斯拉、xAI、X、Neuralink、Boring Company）之间广泛的财务和运营相互联系，将马斯克本人列为公司的重大风险因素。

title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang identifies a $200 billion market opportunity in CPUs designed for AI agents, positioning the company for significant growth beyond its current GPU dominance.
content: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

zh.title: 黄仁勋称发现英伟达"全新"2000亿美元AI代理芯片市场
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋发现了价值2000亿美元的AI代理芯片市场机会，将推动公司在GPU之外实现新的增长。

title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
summary: Anthropic projects it will more than double revenue to approximately $10.9 billion in the second quarter, putting the company on track for its first profitable quarter.
content: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

zh.title: Anthropic称即将实现首个盈利季度
zh.summary: Anthropic预计第二季度收入将翻倍增长至约109亿美元，公司有望实现首次盈利。
